summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SERVE AI refactored architecture with separate services. All key features functioning correctly including role-based views, Claude LLM integration, journey tracking, and admin tooling.
passed_tests: Role selector page loads with 3 role cards (Volunteer, Ops, Admin)
Volunteer chat interface sends and receives messages successfully
AI responses generated via Claude LLM working properly
Journey progress updates through onboarding states (33% → 50%)
Profile extraction from user messages (name, skills, location)
Ops view shows pipeline dashboard with session stats (6 total, 6 active)
Admin view shows session browser with search and details
All health endpoints return healthy status
Orchestrator interaction API processes chat messages
MCP capabilities sessions listing works in Ops/Admin views
Backend API tests: 16/16 passing (100% success rate)
Frontend role navigation between all three views
Real-time journey progress tracking in volunteer sidebar
Session details and conversation history in admin console
Pipeline column organization in ops dashboard
